refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key aspects of worksite mapping that are critical for operational effectiveness and safety: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation. This clarifies verification and design focus.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, identified obstacles, and clearly marked work zones; validate accuracy against ground truth data and stakeholder acceptance.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
Represent designated work zones within the worksite model.

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
Apply real-time data processing algorithms for feature extraction and classification.
Generate a georeferenced digital worksite map with layered representations.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion combined with real-time processing algorithms to generate a georeferenced digital worksite map including terrain, obstacles, and work zones.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates sensing and processing functions with manageable coupling; modular algorithm design can isolate concerns.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in worksite conditions.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting map accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor performance and processing latency; consider fallback strategies for sensor failure.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing, and generating the worksite model.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to detected obstacles or unsafe zones to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for worksite mapping; high containment of related functions with low diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; moderate diffusion risk if mapping logic is duplicated.
Uses mapping data for remote operation; should not contain mapping logic to avoid diffusion.
Receives alerts but does not perform mapping; minimal containment relevance.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential for sensor data preprocessing duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules.
Interface latency or data format mismatches between modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enforce strict interface contracts and avoid embedding mapping logic outside NGHE Solution.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear traceability and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of mapping logic duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if not controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the single owner of mapping functionality, reducing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's output maps against ground truth and stakeholder criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping FR to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define interface data formats and protocols explicitly to prevent integration issues.
Establish monitoring for sensor data quality and processing latency.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, feasible, and meet safety-critical requirements with clear ownership and interface definitions.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
Represent designated work zones within the worksite model.

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently detailed and consistent; proceed to next decomposition level.

evidence_needed: Sensor performance data in operational conditions.
